hero.subTitle: Trusted by Nature
hero.description: Premium quality edible seeds, cold pressed oils and essential oils for a healthier tomorrow.

products.pumpkinSeedsDesc: Hulled, sun-dried pumpkin seeds packed with natural oils and minerals.
products.sunflowerSeedsDesc: Premium grade sunflower seeds, cleaned and graded for bulk supply.
products.flaxSeedsDesc: Golden and brown flax seeds rich in omega-3 and dietary fibre.
products.chiaSeedsDesc: Farm-fresh chia seeds sourced responsibly for everyday nutrition.
products.blackSesameDesc: Traditionally cleaned black sesame with a deep, nutty aroma.
products.oliveOilDesc: Slow, cold-pressed olive oil that retains natural flavour and nutrients.
products.mustardOilDesc: Traditionally extracted mustard oil with a bold, pungent character.
products.coconutOilDesc: Virgin coconut oil extracted fresh, preserving natural sweetness.

about.title: Rooted In Nature
about.subTitle: Committed to Quality
about.description1: At Faar Earth, we strive to provide the best of ingredients to food processing industries globally. We are a premier, India-based export enterprise specialising in sourcing, processing and delivery of high-quality agricultural ingredients and plant-based solutions.
about.description2: We bridge the gap between India's rich agricultural biodiversity and stringent global quality standards. Headed by two people combining very complimentary skillsets of a seasoned corporate veteran and someone who grew up in an Indian family business, we offer seamless, reliable and highly scalable supply chain solutions designed for modern food manufacturers.
